title: ItsRainingRaincoats
description: Leading product development for a non-profit organisation supporting migrant workers in Singapore. Managing feature roadmap, coordinating with engineering volunteers, and conducting user research to improve platform usability.

title: Campus Growth & Advocacy
role: Microsoft Student Ambassador · Perplexity AI Campus Growth Partner
description: Microsoft Student Ambassador (Jan 2026 – Present): Organising technical workshops and events to foster AI literacy on campus. Perplexity AI Campus Growth Partner (Aug – Dec 2025): Drove campus adoption and awareness of AI-powered search tools through events and community engagement.

title: NUS Students' Computing Club
description: Led a team to manage corporate partnerships, sponsorships, and external communications for the largest computing student organisation at NUS. Secured partnerships with tech companies for career fairs, hackathons, and networking events.

title: Hackathons
description: Active hackathon participant across various themes including fintech, sustainability, and social impact. Notable participations include NUS Hack&Roll, iNTUition, DSTA BrainHack, Lifehack, and Google DSC Hacks.
